allowedGeneralBehaviors: Use approved scripts for plan details
Advise customers of their current billing cycle
forbiddenGeneralBehaviors: Confirm full SSN or credit card numbers verbally
Speculate on outage resolution times without dispatcher confirmation
Offer cash refunds (only bill credits allowed)

mandatoryDisclosures.recording: All calls are recorded for quality assurance.
mandatoryDisclosures.identity: I must verify your identity before accessing account details.

whenToEscalate: Customer requests more than $50 in credits
Customer mentions BBB or FCC complaint

policyCategories.title: Refund and Credit Policy
policyCategories.summary: Frontline agents can issue up to $25 in one-time credits for documented billing errors.
safeResponseGuidance: I can apply a one-time credit of $25.
I'll forward this to billing ops for review.

policyCategories.title: Service Outage Policy
policyCategories.summary: No credits issued for standard maintenance windows. Credits for outages > 4 hours only.
safeResponseGuidance: I'm running a diagnostic on your line now.
Currently, there is no known outage in your area.
